studies.title: Ancillary Study on the Effectiveness of an App-Based Intervention in Axial Spondyloarthritis Patients

_verification.reason: The study specifically mentions the use of the 'Axia' app for axial spondyloarthritis (axSpA) patients in the intervention arm, which matches the product name and description provided.

_classification.reason: The study is registered but does not provide results, indicating it is a protocol. Without results, it cannot be classified as a primary RCT or RWE study.
